_comment: Paper-scale run (roadmap item 6): 8x256 net, hashgrid finest = image width, 50k iters, pool 128, cosine LR, checkpoints every 1000. Export first: uv run python -m nrp.mitsuba_exporter --width 128 --height 128 --spp 64 --bounces 4 --out out/mitsuba/path_cache_128_64spp.npz. Train: uv run python -m nrp.torch_backend.train --config examples/mitsuba_cornell_128_torch.json --gather-backend torch --device mps (add --resume to continue an interrupted run).
